---
title: "git_7"
author: "Mia Fitzgerald"
date: "3/3/2026"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = TRUE) #change later with messages 
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```


### R Markdown


```{r}

```


^[Question 1 complete]
